title: Periyar University Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Various Project Assistant Posts
description: Periyar University has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various  Project Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the Periyar University Notification 2026 . Here, we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of application. If you are looking for...
